tama.title: Tamagochi World
tama.noPet: You have no pet. Pick a type and tap Adopt.
tama.searchActivityHint: The higher the bar, the more often your pet can start searching. Average pause: ~{minutes} min (randomized).
tama.diamondBlocked: Not running now: average wellbeing across four bars is below the threshold ({avg}%; need about 38%). Feed, let it sleep and improve mood.
tama.searchResetHint: Diamond search: any command or eating map food will reset progress

shop.title: Shop
shop.hint: One tap — one purchase. Paid in coins; prices and exchange rate update every hour.
shop.toySuccess: Toy active: mood decreases slower (~24 h per purchase, stacks). Diamond search frequency boost — 10 minutes (stacks). See the “Diamond search” panel on the left.

worldSync.title: Preparing your pet on field
worldSync.text: Your pet is already created — it will appear on the map in a few seconds. This is normal, please wait.

tama.mapHint: Click on the field to command your pet to move to a point. You can’t interact with чужие pets — only watch.

guideSections.title: What are the bars
guideSections.html: Your pet has four bars: health, fullness, mood and energy. Fullness means “is full or hungry”: higher bar — more full. Energy is like силы: run/play — lower, sleep — higher.

guideSections.title: How to restore health
guideSections.html:
• Sleep: health restores ~2× faster while sleeping if the pet isn’t very hungry (same for energy).
  • +10% HP button adds 10% instantly for 30 coins (if you have coins and HP isn’t full).
  • Don’t let it get very hungry or exhausted — health may drop.

guideSections.title: How to restore fullness
guideSections.html: Tap Feed if you have food for your pet type. You buy food in the shop for coins. While sleeping it gets hungry slower than when active.

guideSections.title: How to improve mood
guideSections.html: Tap Play — costs 25 coins. The shop toy can be used so mood decreases slower. Hunger and bad wellbeing hurt mood — feed and watch health.

guideSections.title: How to restore energy
guideSections.html: Put it to sleep with Put to sleep (10 coins). About 5 hours of continuous sleep restores energy from zero to max. While awake, energy drains (usually full bar lasts 6–14 hours depending on activity and wellbeing). If energy hits zero, the pet falls asleep automatically.

guideSections.title: About diamonds
guideSections.html: The pet searches diamonds on the map when it’s doing well. If average wellbeing across the four bars is below the threshold, searching doesn’t start — see the “Search activity” indicator. Higher stats — more attempts. The shop toy gives a passive mood бонус for a day (stacks) and a separate 10-minute search frequency boost (stacks). Remaining time is shown in the same panel.

guideSections.title: Why everything is connected
guideSections.html: A tired, hungry or sick pet loses energy faster and feels worse. Like humans: eat — mood improves, sleep — more energy.

guideSections.title: On the map with other pets
guideSections.html: If one pet is sleeping, they won’t play or fight. Sometimes an awake pet can wake a sleeping one — random, about 1 out of 20.

guideSections.title: Age and diamonds
guideSections.html: The longer the pet lives without recreation, the more often it finds diamonds when doing well: new — about 1 diamond / 2 min, after ~3 months — up to 1 diamond / 1 min at max stats.

guideSections.title: Tip
guideSections.html: Tip: before a long walk on the map, check energy and keep food in запас.

recreateConfirm.title: Create a new pet?
recreateConfirm.text: This will archive your current pet and you will start over with a new one. Your current pet will disappear from the map and its state will be reset. Continue?

escape.title: Need a way out?
escape.noDiamonds: No diamonds — you can do it for free, but inventory will reset and you’ll wait 10 s.

hint.controls: A/D — walk, Space — jump, click — mine, R — block (1/2/3). “To base” teleports home for 1 diamond.
hint.persist: Position is saved when you exit.
